comments.text:
Sir m angiography krwane gya thha Day Care me then mera 3 blockage diagnose hua to day care se IP (Inpatient) me convert hua 3 days ho chuke h general ward me maine ek din angioplasty k approval ka wait kiya or ek din hospital ne delay kiya emergency cases ko pehle krke ,so angioplasty kal se hoga and package kal se start hoga toh mere questions h :
1. 3 Days General ward ka claim milega ya nahi?
2. Consumables or Tests ka claim milega ya nahi?
3. Process ka name cashless h toh at the time of discharge paise company degi and remaining amount hame dena h nah?
